title: Karanga Type Descriptor
description: Describes a node type's shape (format-v0.1 §6.3). Used for base-schema types and for custom types declared in manifest.types.

content.description: The node's own payload kind (format §6.3): none, a canonical inline string (§7), a canonical GFM table serialization (§7.4), or an opaque string.

children.description: Allowed child types; presence makes the type a container.

attrs.description: Permitted attributes and their value domains (no-float domain, §9.1).

render.description: Advisory render hints; the format never depends on them.
